headline: Vision and rendering techniques led the month while agent harness frameworks emerged as a new industry battleground.
body: A cluster of vision and generation techniques topped the rotation this month, with stereo vision, text-to-image generation, image inpainting, and core architecture components layer normalization and RoPE all leading, and image inpainting also breaking out alongside neural rendering and triangle splatting. On the agent side, the doer-judge framework, primitive-action decomposition, role confusion, and emergent behavior all entered as new or breaking-out concepts, paralleled by a wave of meta-harness activity: Latent Space framed the season as Meta-harness summer and Omnigent shipped an open-source meta harness for agents. Geopolitics ran underneath, with Anthropic accusing Alibaba of illicitly extracting AI capabilities, Europe pushing back on Washington's chip export controls, and Cerebras stock falling after its first public earnings. Coding workflow questions also surfaced, from a programmer's account of Claude displacing human review to analysis of how code style drives token costs.

cited_items.title: Anthropic accuses Alibaba of illicitly extracting AI capabilities - BBC
